scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -r index.html sw.js manifest.json css js assets icons data www/ && cp -r *.json www/ 2>/dev/null; rm -f www/package.json www/package-lock.json www/capacitor.config.json www/firebase.json www/firestore.indexes.json www/firestore.rules www/storage.rules
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
